articles.title_en: Russia’s central bank cuts key rate to 14.25%
articles.lead_en: Russia’s central bank cut its key interest rate by 25 basis points, to 14.25%, the regulator announced on its website.
articles.title_raw: Russia’s central bank cuts key rate to 14.25%
articles.lead_raw: Russia’s central bank cut its key interest rate by 25 basis points, to 14.25%, the regulator announced on its website.

articles.title_en: Russian Central Bank Slashes Key Rate to 14.25%
articles.lead_en: The 25-basis-point cut signaled that policymakers remain more cautious than market watchers anticipated, as analysts had broadly expected a larger, 50-basis-point cut.
articles.title_raw: Russian Central Bank Slashes Key Rate to 14.25%
articles.lead_raw: The 25-basis-point cut signaled that policymakers remain more cautious than market watchers anticipated, as analysts had broadly expected a larger, 50-basis-point cut.

articles.title_en: Main figure in the economy: The Central Bank reduced the key rate to 14.25%
articles.lead_en: At a meeting of the board of directors on June 19, the Bank of Russia lowered the key rate by 0.25 percentage points (pp) - from 14.5% to 14.25% per annum. We tell you what this rate is and what it affects
articles.title_raw: Главная цифра в экономике: Центробанк снизил ключевую ставку до 14,25%
articles.lead_raw: Банк России на заседании совета директоров 19 июня снизил ключевую ставку на 0,25 процентного пункта (п.п.) — с 14,5% до 14,25% годовых. Рассказываем, что это за ставка и на что она влияет

articles.title_en: MOEX index declines after Bank of Russia cuts key rate to 14.25%
articles.lead_en: The US dollar gained 17.03 kopecks on Russia's interbank market to 73.49 rubles, while the euro fell 16.5 kopecks to 83.84 rubles
